name: aidolon-native-control
description: AIDOLON desktop and Android TV control tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Control local desktop and TV tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: AIDOLON Native Control exposes the repo desktop automation and Android TV scripts through Codex-native skills and an MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my desktop and take one safe UI step.
Open an app on the TV and capture the screen.
